# IndoGig

> Hospitality staffing firm in Bali, Indonesia. Connects hotels, beach clubs,
> restaurants, and event venues with verified temporary workers via WhatsApp.

## Company
- Legal name: PT INDOGIG HRTECH INDONESIA
- KBLI 78104 licensed (verified by Dinas Tenaga Kerja Bali)
- Headquarters: Jl. Sunset Road Tengah, Seminyak, Bali 80361
- Website: https://indogig.com
- Contact: info@indogig.com / +62 813-1593-5800

## Services
- On-demand hospitality staffing in Bali (single shifts)
- Temp placement with PKWT contracts (1-3 months)
- WhatsApp-first booking — everything via WhatsApp
- Full Indonesian labor law compliance
- Worker vetting and performance rating system
- Weekly transparent invoicing

## Industries Served
- Hotels & Resorts
- Beach Clubs
- Events & MICE
- Restaurants & Cafes
- Destination Weddings
- Retail & Promotions

## Coverage Areas (Bali)
- Seminyak, Canggu, Kuta, Legian, Ubud, Denpasar, Nusa Dua, Jimbaran, Sanur

## How It Works
1. Client sends a WhatsApp message describing their staffing need
2. IndoGig matches the request with verified, rated workers
3. Confirmed staff arrive at the venue. Client rates after the shift.

## Pricing
- Per-shift fee: includes worker pay + 20% service fee
- Entry-level roles: from Rp 175,000 per shift
- Skilled roles: from Rp 250,000 per shift
- Temp placement: 20% monthly fee on worker salary
- No monthly minimums. No hidden charges. Weekly invoicing.
